arts.ttl: Lukaku vs former sides: why Inter and Man Utd are the exceptions
arts.sum: Napoli’s crucial game against Inter will give Romelu Lukaku another chance to break his duck...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim hits back at Roy Keane over scathing Bruno Fernandes comments
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has hit back at comments Roy Keane made about Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandez.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane changes his mind on Marcus Rashford after furious Man Utd rant
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has made a good start to his loan spell at Aston Villa and Manchester United legend Roy Keane praised the forward after he impressed in their FA Cup win over Cardiff

arts.ttl: Roy Keane tells Marcus Rashford what he should be doing next amid Man United exit
arts.sum: Manchester United loanee Marcus Rashford added another assist to his tally on Friday night as Aston Villa progressed to the next round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: 'The right way' - National team boss makes Denmark promise to Manchester United star Chido Obi
arts.sum: Man United striker Chido Obi currently represents Denmark at Under-18s level.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa make Man United admission after booking FA Cup quarter-final spot
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to join Aston Villa in the quarter-finals of the FA Cup on Sunday when they host Fulham at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: 'A, top, top, top player' - Ruben Amorim makes exciting prediction about Man United youngster
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim is excited to see what the future holds for defender Leny Yoro at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester United’s season was built on delusion - but this is what can save it
arts.sum: United believed they could still qualify for Europe through the Premier League when Ruben Amorim was appointed - now it is down to the cups to save their season

arts.ttl: Man United teenager Chido Obi aims thinly-veiled dig at former club Arsenal after FA Youth Cup win over the Gunners
arts.sum: The Red Devils claimed a 3-2 victory after extra time at the Emirates to book their place in the semi-finals on Friday night, with Obi not involved following his recent promotion to the first team.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim 'embarrassed' by Man Utd's poor form
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim admits embarrassment towards Man Utd's poor form.
